goal: Add a side-effect-free preflight for a future runtime dry-run execution mount, validating route name, default-off env gate, confirm phrase, runbook evidence, and ready runtime execution decision without changing routes, server files, orchestrator, providers, DB, GitHub, writes, or deploy.
scope_out: Do not mount or change runtime routes, call orchestrator, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, write files, deploy, change workflows, or change packages.
Do not mutate existing dry-run routes.
claims: A future runtime execution mount can be preflighted without route mutation.
Existing routes must not be mutated by the execution mount path.
Default-off env gate, confirm phrase, and operator runbook are required evidence.
assumptions: BPK-026 has already decided dry-run execution readiness.
A later contract would perform any actual route mount.
dod: The preflight accepts only a new probe route, default-off env gate, sufficient confirm phrase, and runbook evidence.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Runtime route changes, orchestrator calls, provider calls, DB calls, GitHub calls, writes, deployment, package, workflow, or existing-route mutation become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-026 decided runtime execution readiness without execution. BPK-030 may preflight a future mount but must not change routes.
